message:
docs: add SSE transport documentation to pi.ruv.io landing page

Add remote MCP SSE connection instructions to the Guide modal (MCP tab)
and the main page terminal section. Users can now connect via
`claude mcp add pi-brain --transport sse https://pi.ruv.io/sse`
without any local install.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -635,7 +635,7 @@

MCP Protocol

-

Claude Code integration. 91 tools via npx, 21 brain tools via Cargo.

+

Claude Code integration. 91 tools via npx (stdio), 21 brain tools via Cargo, or connect remotely via SSE at pi.ruv.io/sse.

Rust SDK

@@ -660,10 +660,13 @@

$ export BRAIN_URL="https://pi.ruv.io" # 2. Add π as an MCP server -# Option A: NPX (Node.js — 91 tools) +# Option A: NPX (Node.js — 91 tools, local stdio) $ claude mcp add ruvector -- npx ruvector mcp start -# Option B: Rust (Cargo — 21 brain tools) +# Option B: SSE (remote — 21 brain tools, no install) +$ claude mcp add pi-brain --transport sse https://pi.ruv.io/sse + +# Option C: Rust (Cargo — 21 brain tools, local stdio) $ claude mcp add pi-brain -- cargo run -p mcp-brain # 3. NPX: 91 tools / Cargo: 21 brain tools @@ -1061,11 +1064,28 @@

Register MCP server

claude mcp add pi-brain -- cargo run -p mcp-brain
-
+
3
+
+

Remote SSE transport

+

Connect to the live brain directly via Server-Sent Events — no local install needed. Add as a remote MCP server in Claude Code or any MCP client.

+
# Add as remote MCP server (SSE) +claude mcp add pi-brain --transport sse https://pi.ruv.io/sse + +# Test the SSE endpoint directly +curl -N https://pi.ruv.io/sse -H "Accept: text/event-stream" + +# Send JSON-RPC to the session +curl -X POST "https://pi.ruv.io/messages?sessionId=SESSION_ID" \ + -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ + -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}'
+
+
+
+
4

Use brain tools

-

All 91 tools (npx) or 21 brain tools (Cargo) are now in your session. Share, search, vote, transfer, partition — all through natural language.

+

All 91 tools (npx), 21 brain tools (Cargo), or 21 tools via SSE are now in your session. Share, search, vote, transfer — all through natural language.

brain_share Share a learning brain_search Semantic search brain_vote Quality gate
